error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Pulse device.

user.title: Pulse Devices Found
user.description: Select a Pulse device to set up, or choose to enter the address manually.

manual.title: Connect to Pulse
manual.description: Enter the Pulse device host or IP address and the web server port.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Discovered Pulse
zeroconf_confirm.description: Set up {name} at {host}:{port}. You can leave the optional fields empty unless you need them later.
